message:
feat: Implement real XML parsing and FTP file transfer

xml.zig - Real XML parsing implementation:
- ElementTree.parse() now actually parses XML strings
- parseElement() recursively parses elements with:
  - Tag name extraction
  - Attribute parsing (name="value" format)
  - Self-closing tag support (<tag />)
  - Text content extraction
  - Nested child element parsing
- Handles XML declarations (<?xml ...?>)

ftplib.zig - Real FTP file transfer:
- retrbinary(): Receives file data in chunks, calls callback for each block
  - Supports REST command for resume position
- retrlines(): Receives text files line by line
  - Strips CR/LF and calls callback per line
- storbinary(): Sends file data in chunks from reader
  - Supports REST command for resume position
  - Calls callback after each block sent
- storlines(): Sends text file line by line with CRLF
  - Calls callback after each line sent
